heading: Time limitations on the commencement of civil actions arising under Acts of Congress
label: 1658 Time limitations on the commencement of civil actions arising under Acts of Congress
notes: References in TextThe date of the enactment of this section, referred to in subsec. (a), is the date of enactment of , which was approved .Pub. L. 101–650Dec. 1, 1990

children.label: a
children.text: Except as otherwise provided by law, a civil action arising under an Act of Congress enacted after the date of the enactment of this section may not be commenced later than 4 years after the cause of action accrues.
2 years after the discovery of the facts constituting the violation; or
